name: Test Admin roles can view any user's details
description:
Verify Admin/Adopter Admin can view ANY user's details

        Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/users/{user_id}
        Expected:
        - 200 OK for valid user_id
        - Response contains user details

    - Response contains user details
